arts.ttl: Chelsea Hold Firm as Lazio and Torino Battle for Cesare Casadei
arts.sum: The transfer saga surrounding Cesare Casadei continues to intensify, with Chelsea maintaining a resolute stance on the young midfielder's potential departure. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that despite aggressive approaches from Lazio and Torino, the London club remains unmoved by the current transfer offers. The post Chelsea Hold Firm as Lazio and Torino Battle for Cesare Casadei appeared first on FootItalia.com.
